title: Tala Tall Capstan Style Acrylic Pepper Mill, Fully Adjustable Ceramic Grinder for Course and Fine Grinding, Premium Grade for Home and Restaurant use, Refillable and reuseable with Transparent Design
features: SLEEK ACRYLIC DESIGN: The 145mm Tala Capstan Acrylic Pepper Mill features a contemporary acrylic body, providing a modern and stylish addition to any kitchen or dining area
CERAMIC GRINDER: Equipped with a durable ceramic grinding mechanism, this pepper mill ensures long-lasting, rust-free performance and precise grinding

FULLY ADJUSTABLE GRIND SETTINGS: Customise your grind from fine to coarse for perfect seasoning, giving you complete control over your dispensing, This mill can be used for either Salt or Pepper Grinding

VERSATILE DESIGN: Perfect for home or for professional use, This Mill is ideal for Kitchen and table use and perfect for Restaurants and Cafes, the Tala Seasoning mill combines style and practicality for any setting
DURABLE AND LONG-LASTING: Crafted with durable materials, the Tala 145mm Capstan Acrylic Pepper Mill is built for daily use, providing reliable, long-term performance
